revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (11 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories from wikipedia
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 5 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q10789273)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Cat main|Abe clan}} {{Commons cat|Abe clan (Tokugawa vassal)}} {{wikidata link|Q10789273}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Abe clan]] [[en:Category:Abe clan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Imperial House of Japan]] [[Category:Japanese clans]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Plumber]], [[User:Immanuelle]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Abe_clan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
